title: Yoga not religious; an antidote to violence, conflict: India

description:
India on Sunday said Yoga should not be seen as belonging to any particular religion and the ancient spiritual practice can serve as the perfect antidote to stem negative tendencies and move humanity on the path of peace in a world beset by violence and conflict.

Addressing the first International Day of Yoga celebrations at the UN, External Affairs Minister Sushma Swaraj said.
fulltitle: Yoga not religious; an antidote to violence, conflict: India
